positive: Minimalist abstract animal silhouette design, featuring a graceful leaping fox and a stylized mountain range background. The fox must be the primary focus, rendered in clean, solid black silhouette against a vibrant gradient background of deep teal fading to cosmic indigo. Use intricate negative space details within the fox's tail and ears. Composition should be central and balanced, perfectly suited for T-shirt printing. Style should be modern, sophisticated, and inspired by Pacific Northwest tribal art and scientific illustration. Lighting must be flat and highly contrastive, eliminating shadows and depth effects to maintain print clarity. Aspect ratio must be square and graphic. Highly detailed vector art style, ultra-sharp edges, single color focus.
negative: blur, noise, text, signature, watermark, logo, complex details, photographic, graffiti, grainy, extra limbs, malformed, poor anatomy
